hook.summary: Compares the game to Sudoku and introduces the title with a transition of falling crowns.
hook.visual_action: A Sudoku board is shown, then a shower of golden crowns covers the screen to reveal a new puzzle grid.
hook.text_overlay: Like Sudoku puzzles? Try Queens Master.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Like Sudoku puzzles? Try Queens Master. This game has three simple rules.

scene_flow: Introduction comparing the game to Sudoku with a crown transition.
Tutorial walkthrough of Rule 1: One queen per color, showing tile crossing.
Tutorial walkthrough of Rule 2: Queens cannot touch each other.
Tutorial walkthrough of Rule 3: One queen per row and column.
Final puzzle completion and brand reveal.
on_screen_text: Like Sudoku puzzles? Try Queens Master.
This game has three simple rules.
Let's start by crossing out tiles
Single tap to mark an X
Rule 2: Queens can't touch each other.
Rule 3: One queen per row and column.
Double tap to place a queen
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts who enjoy logic games like Sudoku and are looking for a fresh, simple challenge.
